class HistoryStack:
    values: list[int]
    
    def __init__(self):
        self.values = []
    
    def record(self, value: int) -> None:
        self.values.append(value)
    
    def __reversed__(self) -> int:
        i = len(self.values) - 1
        while i >= 0:
            if self.values[i] > 0:
                yield self.values[i]
            i -= 1

def main():
    hs = HistoryStack()
    hs.record(10)
    hs.record(-5)
    hs.record(20)
    hs.record(0)
    hs.record(30)
    
    total = 0
    count = 0
    for val in reversed(hs):
        total = total + val
        count = count + 1
        print(val)
    
    print(count)
    print(total)
